nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Llywelyn was born in Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the daughter of Llywelyn Crug Eryr ap Philip of Llanfair Llythynog Gladestry and Efa ferch Philip. She had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Hywel "Fychan" ap Cadwgon.

de.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Llywelyn wurde in Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Llywelyn Crug Eryr ap Philip of Llanfair Llythynog Gladestry und Efa ferch Philip geboren. Sie hatte mit Hywel "Fychan" ap Cadwgon mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Llywelyn(은)는 영국 웨일스 라드노르실르에서 Llywelyn Crug Eryr ap Philip of Llanfair Llythynog Gladestry(와)과 Efa ferch Philip의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Hywel "Fychan" ap Cadwgon(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.
